name: Daily inbox triage
prompt: Run triage-incoming skill against Gmail unread, last 24h. For each message: classify, score, draft reply (drafts only first 30 days). Append outputs.json. iMessage Caner if any P1.

name: Daily draft queue review
prompt: Read the Gmail draft queue. Surface any draft sitting >24h without Caner sending. iMessage Caner if >5 drafts pending.

name: Weekly KB digest
prompt: Cluster repeat questions from last 7 days of triaged tickets. For any cluster ≥3, propose a KB article to Content + SEO via Notion KB DB.
